title: crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. sonchifolium
intro: Crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. sonchifolium, also known as Korean artichoke, is a perennial plant in the family Compositae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Crepidiastrum sonchifolium subsp. sonchifolium include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or extracts, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
